global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on rewards for new players.
global.main_message: Players can win epic rewards by claiming offers.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a lively backdrop.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: A stylized logo for 'PixelForge' appears at the top left, featuring bold, modern typography.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four circular game icons are arranged in a grid pattern, each with a simple design and muted colors.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A circular game icon with a simple design is positioned in the top center area.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: Another circular game icon with a simple design is located next to the previous icon.

elements.label: Main text
elements.description: The main text reads 'Win epic rewards' in bold, large font, centrally positioned.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message states 'Free rewards for new players' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Claim reward' is located at the bottom center, designed to attract attention.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular decorative element is placed above the main text, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circular decorative element is positioned next to the previous one.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A third small circular decorative element is located below the main text, complementing the design.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unidentified element occupies a central position, possibly a placeholder or additional graphic.
elements.text_content: Win epic rewards Free rewards for new players

elements.label: PixelForge headline
elements.description: The word 'PixelForge' is displayed prominently at the top, serving as the brand's headline.

elements.label: Claim reward text
elements.description: The text 'Claim reward' is displayed at the bottom, encouraging user action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
